name: mach-triage
title: Mach Triage
description: Triage Jira, Linear, and GitHub tickets without leaving Raycast. Search, check your Today board, change status, add comments, and log work — all routed through the Mach Triage desktop app on your local machine. No cloud. No latency. No context switching.
author: MikeWhob

preferences.name: bridgeUrl
preferences.title: Bridge URL
preferences.description: Mach Triage local bridge URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:17847). Copy from Mach Triage Settings → Raycast.

preferences.name: bridgeToken
preferences.title: Bridge Token
preferences.description: Generated in Mach Triage Settings when Raycast integration is enabled.

commands.name: search-tickets
commands.title: Search Tickets
commands.subtitle: Mach Triage
commands.description: Full-text search across your active workspace. Finds by key, title, or description.

commands.name: today-board
commands.title: Today Board
commands.subtitle: Mach Triage
commands.description: Your Active / Stuck / Next / Done lanes — same board, keyboard-first.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Mach Triage Status
commands.subtitle: Mach Triage
commands.description: Health check. Confirms the desktop app bridge is running and authenticated.
